transcript: Okay, how can I help you?
Yeah, they wanted to... get that moisturization goin'.
The which... I'm sorry, the which one?
They... the one they'd heard so much about.
You're calling in behalf of Jones to... could you repeat yourself again? Because I'm not...
Yeah, yeah, yeah, you bet. To get that moisturization, uh, runnin'.
Uh, the same one... they have been hearing so much about, that was... promoted by Mookie Blaylock... among others.
Hmm... you lost me there, man.
So you wanna shine us up, or...? Where do y... where do ya stand, you know?
You bet. Well, the... you know, the beautification, really.
Just some... just some good ol' boys, you know?
Just a few of us, and...
You guys are a band, or...?
Well, yeah, we were in Newsweek.
You might have seen that thing, there was a mermaid in there, and...
What kind of music do you guys play?
Oh. I... all I have here... the bands that do play for me, they, uh... uh, play salsa and cumbia and merengue. A lot of Spanish or Latin music.
Well, uh... you, uh... you willin' to moisten us up, or what?
Um, don't... we don't play that kind of, uh, music here.
Um... what you just said. You said "caveman"?
Like I said, we have... we're... we're... we're a salsa and merengue place, a Latin... we have a lot of Latin music here, so...

Yeah, that's all we... that's all we play here. I've already tried all the other... different... I've tried blues nights, I've tried jazz... and... and nothing else works other than the... the Latin music, so that's what I stuck to.
Would you try, uh... moistenin' me up, or...?
I would not be inclined to try it.
Well, I mean... they gave me your number, you know.
Who... who gave you my number?
"Cokey Blaylock"? Cokey Blaylock... I don't know who Cokey Blaylock is.
Ohh. At least you gotta pay me back, then.
Yeah, you can just send... just go online and, uh... just, uh, send me a payment.
Well, it'd be, like... a hundred and seventy-five.
Plus... plus their seven percent fee. So it'd actually be like... uh, one eighty-two, total.
What would I be paying you for?
Well, I mean, the referral. If you're not gonna... get... get me moisturization, like... you know, then I just need reimbursement, you know, just... expenses.
I... expenses? I didn't hire you, I didn't call you, I didn't... you know.
Yes, you did. For the whole beautification project. [coughs]
What beautification project are you talking about, man?
I don't... I don't know who Mookey Blaylock is, I don't know what the hell you're talking about.
Well, all of a sudden you expect me to be a... a merengue dancer or somethin', and all I'm sayin'...
What... what are you... what are you talking about? Wait a minute. You called me, alright?
You called me, and you're telling me that...

...of... of some beautification? I don't know what the hell you're talking about. I don't know what you're talking about. I'm a bar owner... I'm a bar owner, and I have... cumbias and salsas, and... that's the kinds of bands... [unclear]
How do you expect me to dance? Seriously!
What dancing? What... what dancing? What the hell are you talking about?
I... I'm talking about a few good ol' boys... comin' down. Gettin' moisturized. And then...
...you're talking about merengue dancing, and I've already outlaid... a hundred seventy-five dollars through Cokey Blaylock.
That's not my fault. That's not my fault.
You need to talk to Corky, or whoever the hell gave you my number, 'cause... that's not my fault. I had nothing to do with that.
I don't know what the hell you're t--
"It was on a wall." [scoffs] Dude, lose my number, alright?
George, yeah, listen. Can I just get an online payment from you?
What... you're not gonna get no payments from me. I don't know who you are, you're just gonna pick up the phone and call me and tell me... "send me a payment"? You're crazy!
We'll call it good. One seventy-five, you can just skip--
You're full of it, buddy. Lose my number!
You can skip the fees, you know?
What fees are you talking about? I don't even--
I don't know who you are... I've never hired you, I have nothing to do with you, I don't know who the hell this Corky person is. I--
You... you've never heard of Mookie Blaylock before. Is that what...?
I don't know who the hell Mookie Blaylock is!
You... ha... you secured it with Cokey Blaylock for me to come out here.
I didn't secure with anybody, anything.
And now you're not gonna moisturize us?
"Moisturize"... I mean, what the hell are you talking about? What... what are you talking about, "moisturizing"? What's... "moisturizing"? What the hell are you talking about?
I... I'm lookin' at a digital signature...from you.
And you can skip the... the... song and dance about the merengue stuff. All I--
A... all I need is a PayPal.
You "need a PayPal, 'cause I hired you". Man, I didn't hire anybody.
I didn't hire you, I don't know who Mookey is, I don't know what you're talking about. You're calling the wrong person.
Let me give you my email address.
What... I don't want your email address. I don't know--
And you can send me a PayPal payment. And we'll just--
I'm not going to send you no PayPal payment!

You set it up. Talk to my lawyer. I don't know who the hell you are, I don't know... you're just gonna pick up the phone and call me, and say, "oh yeah, send me a hundred and seventy-five dollars." You're full of shit!
I don't know who you are, I've never hired you, I don't know who this Mookie person you're talking about is, I don't know what the hell you're talking about.
You're calling me telling me, man, I don't know what the hell moisturizing is. What the fuck you talking about, dude?
Beautification of the whole project, man.
Of what project?! I don't know what freaking project you're talking about!
I'm thinking just some good ol' boys, comin' down.
"Thinking of some good ol' boys coming down", and I'm gonna pay a hundred seventy-five bucks for some good ol' boys coming down, to do what?
We... we can't do merengue movements and things like that. It's not gonna happen.
I don't know what the hell you're talking about. I don't know what you're talking about. And... l... lose--
Lose my number or you're going to piss me off.
I swear, you're going to fuckin' piss me off. Lose my fuckin' number. You call me one more time, I swear, dude, I'll... let me run across you, you son of a bitch. Lose my number. Alright?
Why don't you just send me a PayPal payment, we'll call it good?
I ain't paying you nothing! We're not calling... I ain't sending you nothing! You want a hundred seventy-five, why don't you come over here and come collect a hundred and seventy-five?
Come... come over here and try to collect the money. Come over here. And try to collect that money.
Well, if it's certified, I will.
Uh... certified what? There's no certification, I don't know who you are.
Who... I'm not gonna give you no money. Okay? I'm not gonna give you no money.
[clears throat] I already incurred a hundred seventy-five dollars in expenses!
Well, that's not my fault! I don't know who the hell you are!
If you don't have moisture and you've got... all kinds of other things happening... that's not my fault.
What the hell's "moisture"? What the hell's "moisture"? What are you talking about? What are you talking about?
I don't know what the fuck you're talking about.
Cokey Blaylock, that doesn't ring a bell?
I don't know who the fuck Cokey Blaylock is!
Well... that's why I'm trying to give you my email address, you can just send me the payment, we'll call it good!
I ain't sending you a fuckin' penny, you understand me?
I ain't sending you a fuckin' penny. I don't know who the fuck you are, I don't know who the fuck Cokey Blaylock is. Lose my number. Lose my number, buddy.
You wanna meet? I'll meet you right now.
I'm over here at my bar! Come over.
[scoffs] I'll be there in... fifteen minutes.
You... could... call me a cab.
I'm not gonna fucking call you a cab. You're stupid! What the fuck's the matter with you? Who the fuck are you?
Who the fuck are you? Who's... who are you calling me?

I don't who you are, I don't what the fuck... what side of the bed you got up today, buddy, but you're talking to the wrong fuckin' number, buddy. You're dialing... you're talking to the wrong number.
Are you trying to tango with me?!
I'm not trying to tango, you're the one that called me! You're the one that called me. And now you're saying "call me a cab". What the fuck's the matter with you?

I... yeah, moisten you up? Dude, you're going to fuckin' piss me off, dude. You're gonna fuckin' piss me off really bad right now. Lose my fuckin' number. You call me one more time, you son of a bitch, I'm... watch what's gonna happen to you.
[scoffs] Why don't you just cut me a check?
Hey, listen, let me just give you my email address.
Dude, l... l... listen to me. If this is a fuckin' joke, whatever you guys are doing, you need to cut it off already. [unclear]
You better quit jokin' around with me, pal!
I'm not joking around with you, you're the one calling me!
I'm on my phone and you're on the other line.
I need PayPal in the next forty-five minutes.
You can kiss my ass. And... put... put PayPal up your ass, too.
You don't even have my email address!
Dude, you're going to piss me off.
I need a payment, and I need it within the hour!
Dude, I'm not giving you no payment, I ain't giving you no money. I don't know who Mookie Blaylock is. You're crazy. You're full of shit. You're crazy.
I'll take care of you real quick if I come down there.
Well, come on down! Come on down.
What, you don't think I'm gonna come down there?
Come on down! Come on down, you dumb shit. Come on down.
I'll be the only one leavin'.
I wanna see a check book when I get there.
You can fuckin' kiss my ass. Come on down. You think you're fuckin' tough, come on down. Dumb shit.
